notes: The quiet one. Held breath, not shouting. Thesis is the ending couplet: 'Or maybe the surface was never the goal / And the deep is just where I go to feel whole.' AUDITED 2026-04-20: refrain + hook bars demoted to ribbons so the final thesis couplet can be the two keys of the song. Under the directional-lane model the refrain will scroll alternating cyan/amber which IS the song's feeling — the line breathes itself.

chunks.note: And the deep doesn't ask — refrain ribbon, cyan
learning to stop — refrain ribbon, amber
stubborn to kill — hook ribbon, amber
too far down to kill — deeper ribbon (variation marker)
Or maybe the surface was never the goal — thesis pt1, KEY
And the deep is just where I go to feel whole. — thesis pt2, biggest KEY on the album
